metadata.scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Atyant Pichhda Varg Medhavriti Yojana

raw_data.details: The "Mukhyamantri Atyant Pichhda Varg Medhavriti Yojana" was launched by the Backward and Extremely Backward Class Welfare Department, Government of Bihar. The scheme aims to encourage academic excellence among students belonging to extremely backward classes. A one-time financial incentive is provided to students who have passed the 10th class (Matric) examination in the first division from the Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB).
raw_data.benefits: A one-time scholarship of ₹10,000 is provided per student. Note: Payment will be made via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into the beneficiary’s bank account.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Bihar. The applicant should be a student. The applicant should belong to the Extremely Backward Class (BC-I) category. The applicant should have passed the 10th class (Matric) examination in the first division from the Bihar School Examination Board, Patna.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineApplication Process:The eligible students may contact their respective schools and ensure the availability of required documents such as a caste certificate, mark sheet, Aadhaar card, etc. The Bihar School Examination Board provides the list of eligible students to the Education Department. Documents and identity of eligible students are verified by the concerned authorities. The authorized officer of the Education Department verifies and approves the disbursement.
raw_data.documents_required: Student Provides Document to the SchoolCaste CertificateResidence CertificateAadhaar CardMark SheetCopy of Bank Passbook/ Bank account detailsAny other documents as required

To know more please visit Check EligibilityBiharMukhyamantri Atyant Pichhda Varg Medhavriti YojanaExtremely Backward ClassFinancial AssistanceMatricStudentDetailsThe "Mukhyamantri Atyant Pichhda Varg Medhavriti Yojana" was launched by the Backward and Extremely Backward Class Welfare Department, Government of Bihar. The scheme aims to encourage academic excellence among students belonging to extremely backward classes. A one-time financial incentive is provided to students who have passed the 10th class (Matric) examination in the first division from the Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB). BenefitsA one-time scholarship of ₹10,000 is provided per student. Note: Payment will be made via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into the beneficiary’s bank account. EligibilityThe applicant should be a permanent resident of Bihar. The applicant should be a student. The applicant should belong to the Extremely Backward Class (BC-I) category. The applicant should have passed the 10th class (Matric) examination in the first division from the Bihar School Examination Board, Patna. Application ProcessOfflineApplication Process:The eligible students may contact their respective schools and ensure the availability of required documents such as a caste certificate, mark sheet, Aadhaar card, etc. The Bihar School Examination Board provides the list of eligible students to the Education Department. Documents and identity of eligible students are verified by the concerned authorities. The authorized officer of the Education Department verifies and approves the disbursement. Documents RequiredStudent Provides Document to the SchoolCaste CertificateResidence CertificateAadhaar CardMark SheetCopy of Bank Passbook/ Bank account detailsAny other documents as requiredFrequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible to apply for the scheme? Students from Bihar's Extremely Backward Class (BC-I) who passed Class 10 in the first division from BSEB. Is the scheme applicable to all boards? No, only students who passed from the Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) are eligible. Is the scholarship a one-time benefit? Yes, it is a one-time incentive after passing the 10th class. What is the mode of payment? Payment is made via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) to the student’s bank account. Is there any application fee? No, there is no fee to avail this scholarship. What is the scholarship amount? The financial assistance of ₹10,000 per eligible student. Do I need to apply individual? No individual application is needed. Eligible students are selected based on the BSEB-provided list. Who is implement the scheme? The scheme is implemented by the Education Department, Government of Bihar. What if my documents are not verified? The student will not receive the scholarship without proper verification. When will the amount be disbursed? After successful verification of documents and authorization by the Education Department. Sources And References[Guidelines](https://state.bihar.gov.in/bcebcwelfare/cache/41/03-Apr-25/SHOW_DOCS/LTR-03.pdf)OkWas this helpful?
raw_data.scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Atyant Pichhda Varg Medhavriti Yojana

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Students from Bihar's Extremely Backward Class (BC-I) who passed Class 10 in the first division from BSEB.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable to all boards?
faqs.answer: No, only students who passed from the Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) are eligible.

faqs.question: Is the scholarship a one-time benefit?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is a one-time incentive after passing the 10th class.

faqs.question: What is the mode of payment?
faqs.answer: Payment is made via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) to the student’s bank account.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee?
faqs.answer: No, there is no fee to avail this scholarship.

faqs.question: What is the scholarship amount?
faqs.answer: The financial assistance of ₹10,000 per eligible student.

faqs.question: Do I need to apply individual?
faqs.answer: No individual application is needed. Eligible students are selected based on the BSEB-provided list.

faqs.question: Who is implement the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is implemented by the Education Department, Government of Bihar.

faqs.question: What if my documents are not verified?
faqs.answer: The student will not receive the scholarship without proper verification.

faqs.question: When will the amount be disbursed?
faqs.answer: After successful verification of documents and authorization by the Education Department.
